architectural_notes: Delete action must enforce ownership (only uploader can delete).
Deletion must be permanent: remove upload from storage and remove associated feed item.
known_issues: No option currently exists to delete an upload from the main feed.

existing_features.title: Ensure the main feed shows a delete action for uploads that belong to the currently authenticated user, including the existing backend-upload item titled "test".

Implement deletion for feed items so that deleting a published backend upload permanently removes the post and its associated stored audio blob, and deleting a draft upload permanently removes it from local device storage.
Enforce that only the uploader/author can delete their own published backend uploads (UI gating + backend authorization).

new_feature_requests.summary: Add delete-upload option in main feed: users can delete only their own uploads; deletion permanently removes from storage (not just hides)

projectName: Add delete option for uploads in main feed with permanent removal and per-user authorization
